prestazioni: Replacement of the original Type 753 1.5L flat-8 engine with a fully restored and blueprinted unit featuring forged Mahle pistons (8.0:1 compression), titanium con-rods from Pankl Racing Systems, and a bespoke Bosch mechanical fuel injection system with dual-plunger pumps for precise 12,000 RPM operation

Installation of a custom-built 8-into-2-into-1 equal-length stainless steel exhaust manifold (designed by Akrapovič) paired with a straight-pipe titanium exhaust system, reducing backpressure by 38% while maintaining FIA period-correct sound regulations

Integration of a bespoke dry-sump lubrication system by Moroso, featuring a 12-stage scavenge pump, dual oil coolers (Setrab 20-row), and a 10-liter titanium oil tank with internal baffling to prevent oil starvation during sustained 3.5G lateral loads
estetica: Full restoration of the original aluminum monocoque chassis with period-correct rivet patterns, followed by a custom clear-anodized finish to highlight the hand-beaten panels (executed by RML Group)

Installation of a lightweight carbon-fiber rear wing (designed by YCOM) with adjustable Gurney flaps and a central support strut, replicating the 1962 Dan Gurney-driven configuration for optimal downforce at Spa-Francorchamps

Replacement of the original magnesium wheels with bespoke 15-inch center-lock magnesium alloys (forged by Dymag) wrapped in Avon historic racing tires (CR6ZZ compound) for improved mechanical grip and heat dissipation
